name: Wild West Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the barbecue sauce, steak sauce, ketchup, and Tabasco sauce in a stainless steel bowl.
2. Add the minced white onions and whisk until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator until ready to use.
4. Serve with French fries, onion rings, sandwiches, and hamburgers.
